Tools
Bonus: Operation Quick Start
Most important…
• There is no perfect solution; no one-size-fits-all
• Tools are 10x easier than they used to be
• Can still be frustrating
• Most have good tutorials
• YouTube and Google are your friends
Most important…
• The stuff I use is probably not the stuff you should
use
• I’ll tell you what I use
• But I have a team and lots of resources
• And I have needs that you probably don’t have
• None of your decisions on tools are permanent
